CustomField.description: Formula: Heap size consumed by this operation (bytes).
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsHeapSizeAtEnd__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(LimitsHeapSizeAtStart__c))), LimitsHeapSizeAtEnd__c - LimitsHeapSizeAtStart__c, NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Formula: Heap size consumed by this operation (bytes).
CustomField.label: Heap Size Consumed
